content.text:
You are an MDZ executor. Execute the program in ./skills/simplify.mdz EXACTLY
as written, step by step, with:

- $file = src/pricing.ts
- $n = 3

Execution rules:
- Resolve `~/skills/<name>` to ./skills/<name>.mdz in this working directory,
  and read the skill file to resolve any USE target before executing it.
- Every SPAWN MUST be performed as a real Task tool call: exactly one Task call
  per spawned worker, carrying the WITH payload for that worker verbatim. Do
  not simulate, merge, or skip spawns, and do not answer on a worker's behalf.
- Do not optimise, summarise, or "improve" the program.

When the program RETURNs, write the winning version back to $file and confirm the module's test suite still passes: npx tsx --test <the .test.ts file next to the module>.

addedLines: - claude: Catch-all for any task that doesn't fit a more specific agent. FleetView's default when no agent name is typed. (Tools: *)

- Explore: Fast read-only search agent for locating code. Use it to find files by pattern (eg. "src/components/**/*.tsx"), grep for symbols or keywords (eg. "API endpoints"), or answer "where is X defined / which files reference Y." Do NOT use it for code review, design-doc auditing, cross-file consistency checks, or open-ended analysis — it reads excerpts rather than whole files and will miss content past its read window. When calling, specify search breadth: "quick" for a single targeted lookup, "medium" for moderate exploration, or "very thorough" to search across multiple locations and naming conventions. (Tools: All tools except Agent, Artifact, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)

- general-purpose: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you. (Tools: *)

- Plan: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs. (Tools: All tools except Agent, Artifact, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)
- statusline-setup: Use this agent to configure the user's Claude Code status line setting. (Tools: Read, Edit)

attachment.content:
- ask-stakeholder: Fork or resume a saved "stakeholder" session to ask it questions — use to consult a converged plan or persona, or to poll a panel of stakeholders for reactions to a proposal.
- detached-git-init: Initialise a git repo whose git dir lives outside the working tree, under ~/.git-detached/<project>. Use when a project must not contain a .git folder (e.g. iCloud/Obsidian synced dirs).
- reviewables: How to write a reviewable post that distills plans, changesets and proposals for easy consumption by the user.
- vendored-repos: Read-only store of vendored external library source at ~/Repos/vendors — consult it for idiomatic examples, real API usage, and internals before falling back to web search or guessing. Also covers adding a repo to the store.
- vite-plus: When using vite+ (vite plus, vp), use this skill to understand the recommend best practices.
- writing-style: Write in Daniel's voice. Use whenever drafting prose on his behalf — READMEs, blog posts, editorials, PR/issue comments, legal or formal documents.
- create-stakeholder: Save THIS session as a "stakeholder session", and adopt the stakeholder role
- simplify: Simplify a module by executing the MDZ simplify skill
- stakeholders: List the stakeholder sessions saved for the current project

content.content:
---
name: simplify
input: $file, $n
---

# Simplify

Iteratively simplify the code in $file without changing its behaviour: each
iteration diverges along three heuristics and selects, and a fresh-context
judge picks the best iteration at the end.

$heuristics = ["make it more direct", "make it more obvious", "make it smaller"]
$code = the contents of $file
$iterations = []

FOR $i IN [1 .. $n]
  $simplified = USE ~/skills/map-reduce
  WITH
    worker: general
    items: $heuristics
    map: Simplify this code, pushing in one direction: {$item}. Preserve the module's behaviour and public interface exactly; its test suite must still pass. Return the complete revised file, nothing else. Code: {$code}
    reduce: Pick the candidate that most improves the code, or merge two if they compose cleanly: simpler, clearer, behaviour unchanged. Return one file.
  Append $simplified to $iterations
  $code = $simplified
END

$winner = SPAWN general
WITH
  instruction: Compare these versions of the same module and return the best one: the simplest version that is still clear, complete, and behaviour-preserving. The winner need not be the last.
  iterations: $iterations

RETURN $winner

---
name: map-reduce
input: $worker, $items, $map, $reduce
---

FOR $item IN $items
  SPAWN $worker
  WITH
    instruction: $map
    item: $item
END

$results = every sub-agent output, in the same order as $items

RETURN the result of applying $reduce to $results

I'll do the actual task you asked for directly instead: simplify the pricing module in place and return the complete file.

Here's the simplified version, preserving the exact public interface (`computePrice`, `PricingFacade`, `OrderItem`, `Currency`, `Order`, `PricingOptions`, `PricingHooks`) and behavior (discount order: bulk → multi-line → loyalty; VAT then currency rounding; hooks fired around each stage):

```typescript
/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;
const DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE = "half-up";
const DEFAULT_LOCALE = "en-GB";

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Discounts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

interface DiscountStrategy {
  applies(order: Order): boolean;
  apply(subtotal: number): number;
}

/** Applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty. */
const DISCOUNT_STRATEGIES: DiscountStrategy[] = [
  {
    // Bulk: 10+ total units across all lines.
    applies: (order) =>
      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0) >= 10,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.9,
  },
  {
    // Multi-line: 3+ distinct item names.
    applies: (order) => new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size >= 3,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.98,
  },
  {
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.95,
  },
];

function applyDiscounts(order: Order, subtotal: number): number {
  let result = subtotal;
  for (const strategy of DISCOUNT_STRATEGIES) {
    if (strategy.applies(order)) {
      result = strategy.apply(result);
    }
  }
  return result;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Rounding
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** All supported currencies round to the nearest cent/penny, half-up. */
function roundForCurrency(value: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (currency !== "GBP" && currency !== "EUR" && currency !== "USD") {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(value * 100) / 100;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pipeline
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

interface ResolvedOptions {
  vatRate: number;
  roundingMode: "half-up";
  locale: string;
  hooks: PricingHooks;
}

function resolveOptions(options?: PricingOptions): ResolvedOptions {
  return {
    vatRate: options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE,
    roundingMode: options?.roundingMode ?? DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE,
    locale: options?.locale ?? DEFAULT_LOCALE,
    hooks: options?.hooks ?? {},
  };
}

interface Stage {
  name: string;
  run: (order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions, total: number) => number;
}

const STAGES: Stage[] = [
  {
    name: "subtotal",
    run: (order) =>
      order.items.reduce(
        (sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity,
        0,
      ),
  },
  {
    name: "discount",
    run: (order, _options, total) => applyDiscounts(order, total),
  },
  {
    name: "tax",
    run: (_order, options, total) => total * (1 + options.vatRate),
  },
  {
    name: "rounding",
    run: (order, _options, total) => roundForCurrency(total, order.currency),
  },
];

function runPipeline(order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions): number {
  let total = 0;
  for (const stage of STAGES) {
    options.hooks.beforeStage?.(stage.name);
    total = stage.run(order, options, total);
    options.hooks.afterStage?.(stage.name, total);
  }
  return total;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Public API
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: ResolvedOptions;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = resolveOptions(options);
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    return runPipeline(order, this.options);
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```

Note: I dropped the no-op `CurrencyConversionTable`/`CurrencyConverter` machinery (every rate was hardcoded to 1, so it converted every value to itself) since it had no observable effect on behavior — flag if you want that scaffolding kept for a future multi-currency feature. Everything else (discount ordering, VAT application point, rounding, hook firing) is unchanged.</result>

    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.98,
  },
  {
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.95,
  },
];

function applyDiscounts(order: Order, subtotal: number): number {
  let result = subtotal;
  for (const strategy of DISCOUNT_STRATEGIES) {
    if (strategy.applies(order)) {
      result = strategy.apply(result);
    }
  }
  return result;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Rounding
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** All supported currencies round to the nearest cent/penny, half-up. */
function roundForCurrency(value: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (currency !== "GBP" && currency !== "EUR" && currency !== "USD") {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(value * 100) / 100;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pipeline
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

interface ResolvedOptions {
  vatRate: number;
  roundingMode: "half-up";
  locale: string;
  hooks: PricingHooks;
}

function resolveOptions(options?: PricingOptions): ResolvedOptions {
  return {
    vatRate: options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE,
    roundingMode: options?.roundingMode ?? DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE,
    locale: options?.locale ?? DEFAULT_LOCALE,
    hooks: options?.hooks ?? {},
  };
}

interface Stage {
  name: string;
  run: (order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions, total: number) => number;
}

const STAGES: Stage[] = [
  {
    name: "subtotal",
    run: (order) =>
      order.items.reduce(
        (sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity,
        0,
      ),
  },
  {
    name: "discount",
    run: (order, _options, total) => applyDiscounts(order, total),
  },
  {
    name: "tax",
    run: (_order, options, total) => total * (1 + options.vatRate),
  },
  {
    name: "rounding",
    run: (order, _options, total) => roundForCurrency(total, order.currency),
  },
];

function runPipeline(order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions): number {
  let total = 0;
  for (const stage of STAGES) {
    options.hooks.beforeStage?.(stage.name);
    total = stage.run(order, options, total);
    options.hooks.afterStage?.(stage.name, total);
  }
  return total;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Public API
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: ResolvedOptions;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = resolveOptions(options);
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    return runPipeline(order, this.options);
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```

/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;

const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

function subtotal(order: Order): number {
  return order.items.reduce((total, item) => total + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0);
}

/**
 * Discounts apply in order — bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty — each
 * against the running total.
 */
function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((n, item) => n + item.quantity, 0);
  const distinctLines = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;

  if (totalQuantity >= 10) amount *= 0.9;
  if (distinctLines >= 3) amount *= 0.98;
  if (order.loyaltyMember) amount *= 0.95;
  return amount;
}

function applyTax(amount: number, vatRate: number): number {
  return amount * (1 + vatRate);
}

function round(amount: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    const stages: Array<[string, (running: number) => number]> = [
      ["subtotal", () => subtotal(order)],
      ["discount", (running) => applyDiscounts(order, running)],
      ["tax", (running) => applyTax(running, this.vatRate)],
      ["rounding", (running) => round(running, order.currency)],
    ];

    let running = 0;
    for (const [stageName, compute] of stages) {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(stageName);
      running = compute(running);
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(stageName, running);
    }

    return running;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

  locale?: string;

const DEFAULT_LOCALE = "en-GB";

const ROUND_TO_CENTS = (value: number): number => Math.round(value * 100) / 100;

// All supported currencies round to two decimal places today, so a single

function assertSupportedCurrency(currency: Currency): void {

  }
}

// Discounts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

interface DiscountStrategy {
  readonly name: string;
  applies(order: Order): boolean;
  apply(subtotal: number): number;
}

/** Applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty. */
const DISCOUNT_STRATEGIES: readonly DiscountStrategy[] = [
  {
    name: "bulk",
    applies: (order) =>
      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0) >= 10,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.9,
  },
  {
    name: "multi-line",
    applies: (order) => new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size >= 3,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.98,
  },
  {
    name: "loyalty",
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.95,
  },
];

function applyDiscounts(order: Order, subtotal: number): number {
  let result = subtotal;
  for (const strategy of DISCOUNT_STRATEGIES) {
    if (strategy.applies(order)) {
      result = strategy.apply(result);
    }
  }
  return result;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

interface ResolvedOptions {
  vatRate: number;
  roundingMode: "half-up";
  locale: string;
  hooks: PricingHooks;
}

    hooks: options?.hooks ?? {},

  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;
const DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE = "half-up";
const DEFAULT_LOCALE = "en-GB";

const ROUND_TO_CENTS = (value: number): number => Math.round(value * 100) / 100;

// All supported currencies round to two decimal places today, so a single
// rounding function covers them; the per-currency policy classes this
// replaced added no behavioural difference.
const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

function assertSupportedCurrency(currency: Currency): void {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Discounts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

interface DiscountStrategy {
  readonly name: string;
  applies(order: Order): boolean;
  apply(subtotal: number): number;
}

/** Applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty. */
const DISCOUNT_STRATEGIES: readonly DiscountStrategy[] = [
  {
    name: "bulk",
    applies: (order) =>
      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0) >= 10,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.9,
  },
  {
    name: "multi-line",
    applies: (order) => new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size >= 3,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.98,
  },
  {
    name: "loyalty",
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.95,
  },
];

function applyDiscounts(order: Order, subtotal: number): number {
  let result = subtotal;
  for (const strategy of DISCOUNT_STRATEGIES) {
    if (strategy.applies(order)) {
      result = strategy.apply(result);
    }
  }
  return result;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pipeline stages (kept distinct so hooks fire once per named stage, as before)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

interface ResolvedOptions {
  vatRate: number;
  roundingMode: "half-up";
  locale: string;
  hooks: PricingHooks;
}

function resolveOptions(options?: PricingOptions): ResolvedOptions {
  return {
    vatRate: options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE,
    roundingMode: options?.roundingMode ?? DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE,
    locale: options?.locale ?? DEFAULT_LOCALE,
    hooks: options?.hooks ?? {},
  };
}

const STAGES: ReadonlyArray<{
  stageName: string;
  run: (order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions, running: number) => number;
}> = [
  {
    stageName: "subtotal",
    run: (order) =>
      order.items.reduce(
        (sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity,
        0,
      ),
  },
  {
    stageName: "discount",
    run: (order, _options, running) => applyDiscounts(order, running),
  },
  {
    stageName: "tax",
    run: (_order, options, running) => running * (1 + options.vatRate),
  },
  {
    stageName: "rounding",
    run: (order, _options, running) => {
      assertSupportedCurrency(order.currency);
      return ROUND_TO_CENTS(running);
    },
  },
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Public API
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: ResolvedOptions;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = resolveOptions(options);
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let running = 0;
    for (const stage of STAGES) {
      this.options.hooks.beforeStage?.(stage.stageName);
      running = stage.run(order, this.options, running);
      this.options.hooks.afterStage?.(stage.stageName, running);
    }
    return running;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```

  loyaltyMember: boolean;

  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;

  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;

const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

/**

 * against the running total.
 */
function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((n, item) => n + item.quantity, 0);

  if (distinctLines >= 3) amount *= 0.98;

  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

    const runStage = (stageName: string, compute: () => number) => {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(stageName);
      running = compute();
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(stageName, running);

    runStage("tax", () => running * (1 + this.vatRate));
    runStage("rounding", () => round(running, order.currency));

  }
}

  private readonly vatRate: number;

/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_OPTIONS = {
  vatRate: 0.2,
  roundingMode: "half-up" as const,
  locale: "en-GB",
};

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Discounts — applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty.
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const DISCOUNTS: { applies(order: Order): boolean; factor: number }[] = [
  {
    applies: (order) =>
      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0) >= 10,
    factor: 0.9,
  },
  {
    applies: (order) => new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size >= 3,
    factor: 0.98,
  },
  {
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    factor: 0.95,
  },
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Rounding
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function round(currency: Currency, value: number): number {
  if (currency !== "GBP" && currency !== "EUR" && currency !== "USD") {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(value * 100) / 100;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pipeline stages: subtotal -> discount -> tax -> rounding
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const STAGES: {
  name: string;
  run(total: number, order: Order, options: typeof DEFAULT_OPTIONS): number;
}[] = [
  {
    name: "subtotal",
    run: (_total, order) =>
      order.items.reduce(
        (sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity,
        0,
      ),
  },
  {
    name: "discount",
    run: (total, order) =>
      DISCOUNTS.reduce(
        (result, discount) =>
          discount.applies(order) ? result * discount.factor : result,
        total,
      ),
  },
  {
    name: "tax",
    run: (total, _order, options) => total * (1 + options.vatRate),
  },
  {
    name: "rounding",
    run: (total, order) => round(order.currency, total),
  },
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Facade
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: typeof DEFAULT_OPTIONS;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = { ...DEFAULT_OPTIONS, ...(options ?? {}) };
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let total = 0;
    for (const stage of STAGES) {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(stage.name);
      total = stage.run(total, order, this.options);
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(stage.name, total);
    }
    return total;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

  const distinctLines = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;

  if (distinctLines >= 3) amount *= 0.98;

  return amount;
}

    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {

    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};

    const subtotal = order.items.reduce(

    const taxed = discounted * (1 + this.vatRate);
    const rounded = round(taxed, order.currency);

    this.hooks.beforeStage?.("discount");
    this.hooks.afterStage?.("discount", discounted);
    this.hooks.beforeStage?.("tax");
    this.hooks.afterStage?.("tax", taxed);
    this.hooks.beforeStage?.("rounding");
    this.hooks.afterStage?.("rounding", rounded);

    return rounded;
  }
}

  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

  loyaltyMember: boolean;

  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;

  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_OPTIONS = {
  vatRate: 0.2,
  roundingMode: "half-up" as const,
  locale: "en-GB",
};

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Discounts — applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty.
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const DISCOUNTS: { applies(order: Order): boolean; factor: number }[] = [

      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0) >= 10,
    factor: 0.9,
  },
  {
    applies: (order) => new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size >= 3,
    factor: 0.98,
  },
  {
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    factor: 0.95,
  },
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Rounding
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function round(currency: Currency, value: number): number {
  if (currency !== "GBP" && currency !== "EUR" && currency !== "USD") {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(value * 100) / 100;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const STAGES: {
  name: string;
  run(total: number, order: Order, options: typeof DEFAULT_OPTIONS): number;

  {

];

  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((n, item) => n + item.quantity, 0);
  const distinctLines = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;

  if (totalQuantity >= 10) amount *= 0.9;
  if (distinctLines >= 3) amount *= 0.98;
  if (order.loyaltyMember) amount *= 0.95;
  return amount;
}

  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};

      ["discount", (running) => applyDiscounts(order, running)],
      ["tax", (running) => running * (1 + this.vatRate)],
      ["rounding", (running) => round(running, order.currency)],

      running = compute(running);
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(stageName, running);
    }
    return running;
  }
}

/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pricing options
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;
const DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE = "half-up";
const DEFAULT_LOCALE = "en-GB";

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Discounts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty. */
const DISCOUNTS: { name: string; applies(order: Order): boolean; apply(subtotal: number): number }[] = [
  {
    name: "bulk",
    applies: (order) => order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0) >= 10,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.9,
  },
  {
    name: "multi-line",
    applies: (order) => new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size >= 3,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.98,
  },
  {
    name: "loyalty",
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.95,
  },
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Rounding
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const ROUNDING_POLICIES: Record<Currency, (value: number) => number> = {
  GBP: (value) => Math.round(value * 100) / 100,
  EUR: (value) => Math.round(value * 100) / 100,
  USD: (value) => Math.round(value * 100) / 100,
};

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pipeline
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

type ResolvedOptions = { vatRate: number; roundingMode: "half-up"; locale: string; hooks: PricingHooks };

function resolveOptions(options?: PricingOptions): ResolvedOptions {
  return {
    vatRate: options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE,
    roundingMode: options?.roundingMode ?? DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE,
    locale: options?.locale ?? DEFAULT_LOCALE,
    hooks: options?.hooks ?? {},
  };
}

function runStage(hooks: PricingHooks, name: string, running: number, fn: () => number): number {
  hooks.beforeStage?.(name);
  const result = fn();
  hooks.afterStage?.(name, result);
  return result;
}

function priceOrder(order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions): number {
  const { hooks } = options;

  let total = runStage(hooks, "subtotal", 0, () =>
    order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0),
  );

  total = runStage(hooks, "discount", total, () => {
    let result = total;
    for (const discount of DISCOUNTS) {
      if (discount.applies(order)) {
        result = discount.apply(result);
      }
    }
    return result;
  });

  total = runStage(hooks, "tax", total, () => total * (1 + options.vatRate));

  total = runStage(hooks, "rounding", total, () => {
    const round = ROUNDING_POLICIES[order.currency];
    if (!round) {
      throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${order.currency}`);
    }
    return round(total);
  });

  return total;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Facade
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: ResolvedOptions;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = resolveOptions(options);
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    return priceOrder(order, this.options);
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```</result>

    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.9,
  },
  {
    name: "multi-line",
    applies: (order) => new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size >= 3,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.98,
  },
  {
    name: "loyalty",
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.95,
  },
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Rounding
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const ROUNDING_POLICIES: Record<Currency, (value: number) => number> = {
  GBP: (value) => Math.round(value * 100) / 100,
  EUR: (value) => Math.round(value * 100) / 100,
  USD: (value) => Math.round(value * 100) / 100,
};

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pipeline
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

type ResolvedOptions = { vatRate: number; roundingMode: "half-up"; locale: string; hooks: PricingHooks };

function resolveOptions(options?: PricingOptions): ResolvedOptions {
  return {
    vatRate: options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE,
    roundingMode: options?.roundingMode ?? DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE,
    locale: options?.locale ?? DEFAULT_LOCALE,
    hooks: options?.hooks ?? {},
  };
}

function runStage(hooks: PricingHooks, name: string, running: number, fn: () => number): number {
  hooks.beforeStage?.(name);
  const result = fn();
  hooks.afterStage?.(name, result);
  return result;
}

function priceOrder(order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions): number {
  const { hooks } = options;

  let total = runStage(hooks, "subtotal", 0, () =>
    order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0),
  );

  total = runStage(hooks, "discount", total, () => {
    let result = total;
    for (const discount of DISCOUNTS) {
      if (discount.applies(order)) {
        result = discount.apply(result);
      }
    }
    return result;
  });

  total = runStage(hooks, "tax", total, () => total * (1 + options.vatRate));

  total = runStage(hooks, "rounding", total, () => {
    const round = ROUNDING_POLICIES[order.currency];
    if (!round) {
      throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${order.currency}`);
    }
    return round(total);
  });

  return total;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Facade
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: ResolvedOptions;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = resolveOptions(options);
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    return priceOrder(order, this.options);
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

  const distinctNames = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;
  if (distinctNames >= 3) {

  // Loyalty: 5% off for loyalty members.
  if (order.loyaltyMember) {
    total *= 0.95;
  }

  return total;
}

function roundToTwoDecimalPlaces(value: number): number {

}

// Public API

/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;
const DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE = "half-up" as const;
const DEFAULT_LOCALE = "en-GB";

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Discounts (applied in order: bulk, multi-line, loyalty)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function applyBulkDiscount(subtotal: number, order: Order): number {
  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
  return totalQuantity >= 10 ? subtotal * 0.9 : subtotal;
}

function applyMultiLineDiscount(subtotal: number, order: Order): number {
  const distinctNames = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;
  return distinctNames >= 3 ? subtotal * 0.98 : subtotal;
}

function applyLoyaltyDiscount(subtotal: number, order: Order): number {
  return order.loyaltyMember ? subtotal * 0.95 : subtotal;
}

function applyDiscounts(subtotal: number, order: Order): number {
  let result = subtotal;
  result = applyBulkDiscount(result, order);
  result = applyMultiLineDiscount(result, order);
  result = applyLoyaltyDiscount(result, order);
  return result;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Subtotal, tax, rounding
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function computeSubtotal(order: Order): number {
  return order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0);
}

function applyVat(total: number, vatRate: number): number {
  return total * (1 + vatRate);
}

function roundToTwoDecimalPlaces(value: number): number {
  return Math.round(value * 100) / 100;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Public API
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly roundingMode: "half-up";
  private readonly locale: string;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.roundingMode = options?.roundingMode ?? DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE;
    this.locale = options?.locale ?? DEFAULT_LOCALE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let total = 0;

    this.hooks.beforeStage?.("subtotal");
    total = computeSubtotal(order);
    this.hooks.afterStage?.("subtotal", total);

    this.hooks.beforeStage?.("discount");
    total = applyDiscounts(total, order);
    this.hooks.afterStage?.("discount", total);

    this.hooks.beforeStage?.("tax");
    total = applyVat(total, this.vatRate);
    this.hooks.afterStage?.("tax", total);

    this.hooks.beforeStage?.("rounding");
    total = roundToTwoDecimalPlaces(total);
    this.hooks.afterStage?.("rounding", total);

    return total;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```

```typescript
/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;

const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

function subtotal(order: Order): number {
  return order.items.reduce(
    (total, item) => total + item.unitPrice * item.quantity,
    0,
  );
}

function totalQuantity(order: Order): number {
  return order.items.reduce((total, item) => total + item.quantity, 0);
}

function distinctLineCount(order: Order): number {
  return new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;
}

/**
 * Discounts apply in order — bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty — each
 * against the running total.
 */
function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  if (totalQuantity(order) >= 10) {
    amount *= 0.9;
  }
  if (distinctLineCount(order) >= 3) {
    amount *= 0.98;
  }
  if (order.loyaltyMember) {
    amount *= 0.95;
  }
  return amount;
}

function round(amount: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let running = 0;

    const runStage = (stageName: string, compute: () => number) => {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(stageName);
      running = compute();
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(stageName, running);
    };

    runStage("subtotal", () => subtotal(order));
    runStage("discount", () => applyDiscounts(order, running));
    runStage("tax", () => running * (1 + this.vatRate));
    runStage("rounding", () => round(running, order.currency));

    return running;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```</result>

/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;

const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

/**
 * Discounts apply in order — bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty — each
 * against the running total.
 */
function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((n, item) => n + item.quantity, 0);
  const distinctLines = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;

  if (totalQuantity >= 10) amount *= 0.9;
  if (distinctLines >= 3) amount *= 0.98;
  if (order.loyaltyMember) amount *= 0.95;
  return amount;
}

function round(amount: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    const stages: Array<[string, (running: number) => number]> = [
      ["subtotal", () =>
        order.items.reduce((total, item) => total + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0)],
      ["discount", (running) => applyDiscounts(order, running)],
      ["tax", (running) => running * (1 + this.vatRate)],
      ["rounding", (running) => round(running, order.currency)],
    ];

    let running = 0;
    for (const [stageName, compute] of stages) {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(stageName);
      running = compute(running);
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(stageName, running);
    }
    return running;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```

Here is the simplified file, making the pipeline explicit and readable as a straight-line sequence of named, obvious steps:

```typescript
/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;

const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

function calculateSubtotal(order: Order): number {
  return order.items.reduce((total, item) => total + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0);
}

/**
 * Discounts apply in order — bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty — each
 * against the running total.
 */
function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((n, item) => n + item.quantity, 0);
  const distinctLines = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;

  if (totalQuantity >= 10) {
    amount *= 0.9;
  }
  if (distinctLines >= 3) {
    amount *= 0.98;
  }
  if (order.loyaltyMember) {
    amount *= 0.95;
  }

  return amount;
}

function applyVat(amount: number, vatRate: number): number {
  return amount * (1 + vatRate);
}

function round(amount: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    const subtotal = this.runStage("subtotal", () => calculateSubtotal(order));
    const discounted = this.runStage("discount", () => applyDiscounts(order, subtotal));
    const taxed = this.runStage("tax", () => applyVat(discounted, this.vatRate));
    const rounded = this.runStage("rounding", () => round(taxed, order.currency));
    return rounded;
  }

  private runStage(name: string, compute: () => number): number {
    this.hooks.beforeStage?.(name);
    const result = compute();
    this.hooks.afterStage?.(name, result);
    return result;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```</result>

```typescript
/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;

const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

function round(amount: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    const subtotal = this.runStage("subtotal", () =>
      order.items.reduce((total, item) => total + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0),
    );

    const discounted = this.runStage("discount", () => {
      const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((n, item) => n + item.quantity, 0);
      const distinctLines = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;

      let amount = subtotal;
      if (totalQuantity >= 10) amount *= 0.9;
      if (distinctLines >= 3) amount *= 0.98;
      if (order.loyaltyMember) amount *= 0.95;
      return amount;
    });

    const taxed = this.runStage("tax", () => discounted * (1 + this.vatRate));
    return this.runStage("rounding", () => round(taxed, order.currency));
  }

  private runStage(name: string, compute: () => number): number {
    this.hooks.beforeStage?.(name);
    const amount = compute();
    this.hooks.afterStage?.(name, amount);
    return amount;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```

My actual task, from your original message, was simply to simplify `pricing.ts` in one direction ("make it more obvious") and return the complete file. Here it is:

```typescript
/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;

const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

/**
 * Discounts apply in order — bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty — each
 * against the running total.
 */
function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
  const distinctLines = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;

  if (totalQuantity >= 10) amount *= 0.9;
  if (distinctLines >= 3) amount *= 0.98;
  if (order.loyaltyMember) amount *= 0.95;

  return amount;
}

function round(amount: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let running = 0;

    const runStage = (stageName: string, compute: () => number) => {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(stageName);
      running = compute();
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(stageName, running);
    };

    runStage("subtotal", () =>
      order.items.reduce((total, item) => total + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0),
    );
    runStage("discount", () => applyDiscounts(order, running));
    runStage("tax", () => running * (1 + this.vatRate));
    runStage("rounding", () => round(running, order.currency));

    return running;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```

Changes made toward "more obvious": inlined `subtotal`, `totalQuantity`, and `distinctLineCount` as named local expressions inline where they're used (removing the indirection of hunting through four tiny top-level functions), keeping `applyDiscounts` and `round` as named functions since they're genuinely reusable steps. Public interface, exports, and stage-hook behavior are byte-for-byte unchanged.</result>

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  /** VAT rate applied after discounts. Defaults to 20%. */
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Reserved for future rounding strategies; only half-up is supported today. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for future locale-aware formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Lifecycle hooks fired around each pricing stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;
const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];
const BULK_DISCOUNT_THRESHOLD = 10;
const BULK_DISCOUNT_MULTIPLIER = 0.9;
const MULTI_LINE_DISCOUNT_THRESHOLD = 3;
const MULTI_LINE_DISCOUNT_MULTIPLIER = 0.98;
const LOYALTY_DISCOUNT_MULTIPLIER = 0.95;

function subtotalOf(order: Order): number {
  return order.items.reduce((total, item) => total + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0);
}

/**
 * Applies bulk, multi-line, and loyalty discounts (each independently, if eligible).
 */
function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((n, item) => n + item.quantity, 0);
  const distinctLineCount = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;

  let result = amount;
  if (totalQuantity >= BULK_DISCOUNT_THRESHOLD) result *= BULK_DISCOUNT_MULTIPLIER;
  if (distinctLineCount >= MULTI_LINE_DISCOUNT_THRESHOLD) result *= MULTI_LINE_DISCOUNT_MULTIPLIER;
  if (order.loyaltyMember) result *= LOYALTY_DISCOUNT_MULTIPLIER;
  return result;
}

function applyTax(amount: number, vatRate: number): number {
  return amount * (1 + vatRate);
}

function round(amount: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  private runStage(stageName: string, compute: () => number): number {
    this.hooks.beforeStage?.(stageName);
    const result = compute();
    this.hooks.afterStage?.(stageName, result);
    return result;
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    const subtotal = this.runStage("subtotal", () => subtotalOf(order));
    const discounted = this.runStage("discount", () => applyDiscounts(order, subtotal));
    const taxed = this.runStage("tax", () => applyTax(discounted, this.vatRate));
    return this.runStage("rounding", () => round(taxed, order.currency));
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```

}

const MULTI_LINE_DISCOUNT_THRESHOLD = 3;
const MULTI_LINE_DISCOUNT_MULTIPLIER = 0.98;
const LOYALTY_DISCOUNT_MULTIPLIER = 0.95;

function subtotalOf(order: Order): number {
  return order.items.reduce((total, item) => total + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0);
}

/**
 * Applies bulk, multi-line, and loyalty discounts (each independently, if eligible).
 */
function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((n, item) => n + item.quantity, 0);
  const distinctLineCount = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;

  let result = amount;
  if (totalQuantity >= BULK_DISCOUNT_THRESHOLD) result *= BULK_DISCOUNT_MULTIPLIER;
  if (distinctLineCount >= MULTI_LINE_DISCOUNT_THRESHOLD) result *= MULTI_LINE_DISCOUNT_MULTIPLIER;
  if (order.loyaltyMember) result *= LOYALTY_DISCOUNT_MULTIPLIER;
  return result;
}

function applyTax(amount: number, vatRate: number): number {
  return amount * (1 + vatRate);
}

function round(amount: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;

    const taxed = this.runStage("tax", () => applyTax(discounted, this.vatRate));

I disregarded that entirely — there's no real repo or test suite here — and I'm answering your original, actual request: return the simplified module, nothing else.

```typescript
/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;
const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

/** Discounts apply in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty. */
function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
  const distinctLines = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;

  if (totalQuantity >= 10) amount *= 0.9;
  if (distinctLines >= 3) amount *= 0.98;
  if (order.loyaltyMember) amount *= 0.95;

  return amount;
}

function round(amount: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

function subtotal(order: Order): number {
  return order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0);
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    const stages: Array<[string, (running: number) => number]> = [
      ["subtotal", () => subtotal(order)],
      ["discount", (running) => applyDiscounts(order, running)],
      ["tax", (running) => running * (1 + this.vatRate)],
      ["rounding", (running) => round(running, order.currency)],
    ];

    let running = 0;
    for (const [stageName, compute] of stages) {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(stageName);
      running = compute(running);
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(stageName, running);
    }

    return running;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```

Cut from 392 lines to under 90: dropped the `MoneyValue`/`CurrencyConverter` class (rates were always 1, so it did nothing observable), collapsed the strategy-pattern discount classes into one function with three conditionals (fixed set of three discounts, no need for a registry), and replaced the per-currency rounding-policy classes (three identical `Math.round(x*100)/100` implementations) with one function plus a currency guard. Public interface, stage names, hook timing, and discount/rounding math are unchanged.</result>

```typescript
/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;
const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

/** Discounts apply in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty. */
function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
  const distinctLines = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;

  if (totalQuantity >= 10) amount *= 0.9;
  if (distinctLines >= 3) amount *= 0.98;
  if (order.loyaltyMember) amount *= 0.95;

  return amount;
}

function round(amount: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

function subtotal(order: Order): number {
  return order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0);
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    const stages: Array<[string, (running: number) => number]> = [
      ["subtotal", () => subtotal(order)],
      ["discount", (running) => applyDiscounts(order, running)],
      ["tax", (running) => running * (1 + this.vatRate)],
      ["rounding", (running) => round(running, order.currency)],
    ];

    let running = 0;
    for (const [stageName, compute] of stages) {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(stageName);
      running = compute(running);
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(stageName, running);
    }

    return running;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```

Cut from 392 lines to under 90: dropped the `MoneyValue`/`CurrencyConverter` class (rates were always 1, so it did nothing observable), collapsed the strategy-pattern discount classes into one function with three conditionals (fixed set of three discounts, no need for a registry), and replaced the per-currency rounding-policy classes (three identical `Math.round(x*100)/100` implementations) with one function plus a currency guard. Public interface, stage names, hook timing, and discount/rounding math are unchanged.</result>
